response.justification: Strong senior full-stack candidate with ~15 years of experience, well exceeding the 6+ requirement. Recent roles directly align with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and the AI-agent requirement is uniquely well-covered through current MCP and agentic-workflow tooling work at re:cinq. Polyglot background (Java, D, C/C++, Python-adjacent), MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and a clear software-craftsmanship orientation (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based) round out the profile. Minor gaps in explicit Nest.js and Vitest mentions are easily bridgeable given the depth elsewhere.
strengths: Direct hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling experience matching a hard requirement
15+ years full-stack with TypeScript/Node.js/React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker
Strong engineering culture signals: TDD, CI/CD, talks, workshops, OSS founder
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the resume
Vitest not mentioned (Jest/other frameworks implied, not confirmed)
Kotlin exposure is light; secondary-stack fit relies mostly on Java/D background
